title: Boyarka Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Boyarka with a Z-Score of -6.51. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Boyarka are extremely cold, with a significant impact on the city's infrastructure. 
 The high humidity level of 77% and moderate wind speed of 10.2 km/h are exacerbating the situation. 
 The Heating Degree Days (HDD) value of 23.8 GG indicates a substantial increase in heating energy demand.
conclusion: Immediate action is required to mitigate the effects of this extreme cold snap.
